message: Jake
Cindy
Gloria
Hey
, is that you?
Hi
What brings you to a place like this?
You seem down; you shouldn't stress so much.
Though I guess that's easier said than done.
Of course.
What's the matter?
You're here again? You're probably the only one who would willingly come here.
Please, could you leave me alone?
to see

The room is kept in top condition for someone who will never come back to it.
No traces of who once lived in this room remain.
There is absolutely nothing in this room that conveys their story.
It's a luxury apartment in a prime location in Upper Manhattan, and the rent is insane. How long do they plan on keeping this place?
I'm almost drained just watching this. Continuing to work like this must be tough.
I'm not her husband or boyfriend,
but I don't feel any attraction to her, who has lost her confidence and motivation.
Can she return to who she was before the incident?
What are you doing here now?
Well, you know,
I was just wondering if you were doing okay.
You don't need to worry about me. I'm fine.
There's no point in blaming myself for what happened.
You're not involved, so it's easy for you to say such cliché things.
I can't help but want to blame myself; what else is there to do?
You're just too exhausted. Maybe you should try leaving this city.
I wish I could do that.
But my whole life, my work, is here.
You could get by as an agent in L.A. or Chicago, right?
You wouldn’t understand, just leave me alone.
What should I do from here?
I still feel like she’s somehow alive somewhere.
I don't know what the background was, but something was off at the Nets Office.
Well, let me tell you something.
Remember the gossip article about Guy that came out in BAM?
I remember. A lot happened because of that.
The source of that article came from the Nets Office.
What!? Why would the Nets do something like that?
I don't know the reason, but we had received a nuisance fee from the Nets beforehand.
Enough with those types of stories. I've heard it from many people.
She must have been caught and killed by the serial murder case's perpetrator.
There could be other possibilities as well.
Like the work of a passing pervert?
That’s impossible.
It's not like impossible things don’t happen, right?
No, that girl is excessively shy.
So, surely, someone she knows must have called her out.
That would significantly limit the suspects.
I think the murderer is someone who was at that party. It sounds strange, but various things have happened after that party.
If I had been nearby, this wouldn't have happened.
But it did.
is utterly exhausted. The reason they look like they're about to collapse might be because they haven't eaten anything.
I know that even if I say something, it won't provide any comfort.
They might as well suffer on their own.
If they feel so guilty, they might as well.
go after them. Anyone can just mourn.
Who killed them, and what was the reason for the murder?
Is it someone who was at that party?
The murderer of the one who was killed? Does that mean that there is a perpetrator of the serial murder case among them?
No way, that can't be!
It's true that there are suspects among the party guests, but...
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
